generated_oml:
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building infrastructure within the AECO domain, specifically exemplified by a Living Lab case study, serving as the physical counterpart for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building operations."
    base:contains IndoorTemperatureSensor, IlluminanceSensor, CO2ConcentrationSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator
]

instance IndoorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for environmental data collection in building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IlluminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Illuminance sensor for environmental data collection in building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2ConcentrationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 concentration sensor for environmental data collection in building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2ConcentrationDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor data collection for monitoring and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorTemperatureSensor
]

instance IlluminanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminanceSensor
]

instance CO2ConcentrationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2ConcentrationSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance OperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data from sensors including temperature, illuminance, CO2, and occupancy data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted, IlluminanceDataTransmitted, CO2ConcentrationDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler, BIMAuthoringToolsEnabler
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with device metadata (e.g., sensor IDs, control logic) and operational data from sensors, serving as the semantic backbone for the DT."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler, BIMAuthoringToolsEnabler
]

instance HonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity with modular service-oriented components and standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance DittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management including automated metadata extraction via Hono/Ditto Configurator"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for visualization with interactive 3D capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualComfortAnalysisService, Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BIMAuthoringToolsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools for modeling with modular extension points for scalable integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization service for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight
]

instance VisualComfortAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort analysis service for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortOptimizationInsight, AdjustLightingAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationAction
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy efficiency"
]

instance VisualComfortOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comfort optimization insights"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effects analysis"
]

instance VisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust lighting based on visual comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuators configured within BIM models to enable operational control"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT and sent to building control systems (BCS) via Ditto, enabling actuation of physical components like lighting or HVAC."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data updates between physical and virtual components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular system integrating BIM as the central semantic model, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, and Unreal Engine 5 for visualization, with standardized extension points for service-oriented extensions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life cycle phases from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment, as part of a life cycle-encompassing optimization approach."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure alignment between physical and virtual components; semantic drift addressed through synchronization techniques."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols enabling bidirectional real-time data exchange between physical assets and the DT."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with IoT platforms, BIM systems, and external services via standardized extension points for cross-system data exchange."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards for semantic interoperability and standardized integration frameworks to ensure compatibility across AECO systems."
]
